coreJobStatement: Design, manufacture, calibrate, and deliver instruments that measure, display, and control industrial process variables to enable safe, efficient, and compliant operation of process plants [SRC: VN_flowmeters]
productJobStatement: Help Process-Fluid Loop to quantify volumetric flow rate and medium temperature at a single inline measurement point in closed-pipe liquid circuits
anchorLevel: L4 (component/subsystem — sensor within parent fluid loop)

segments.name: Continuous thermal management
segments.characteristics: Closed-loop heating/cooling circuits where flow × ΔT = energy (kW)
segments.circumstance: Closed-loop heating/cooling circuits where flow × ΔT = energy (kW)

segments.name: Batch process metering
segments.characteristics: Recipe-driven dosing/blending where flow accuracy = product quality
segments.circumstance: Recipe-driven dosing/blending where flow accuracy = product quality

segments.name: CIP/SIP validation
segments.characteristics: Cleaning circuits where flow proves adequate coverage for hygiene compliance
segments.circumstance: Cleaning circuits where flow proves adequate coverage for hygiene compliance

segments.name: Safety-critical interlock
segments.characteristics: Flow as safety input: low-water cutoff, cooling failure, overtemperature protection
segments.circumstance: Flow as safety input: low-water cutoff, cooling failure, overtemperature protection

segments.name: Fiscal/billing metering
segments.characteristics: Flow measurement as basis for commercial transactions
segments.circumstance: Flow measurement as basis for commercial transactions

segments.name: Water infrastructure monitoring
segments.characteristics: Distribution networks: leak detection, pressure zone management, demand forecasting
segments.circumstance: Distribution networks: leak detection, pressure zone management, demand forecasting

alternatives.name: Ultrasonic transit-time inline flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires acoustic coupling; air bubbles >2% vol degrade accuracy; needs 5–10× DN straight pipe run; pipe must be fully filled; accuracy depends on correct fluid-type configuration at commissioning [SRC: 01_product_decomposition, web_search]

alternatives.name: Electromagnetic (mag) flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires conductive fluid >5 μS/cm (excludes deionized water, glycol); higher power (5–20 W vs <1 W); 2–3× unit cost at DN15–DN25; no temperature co-measurement; larger installation footprint [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Coriolis mass flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: 5–10× unit cost ($200–500 vs $20–60 OEM); significant weight (5–50 kg vs 0.3 kg); inherent pressure drop from bent tube geometry; provides mass flow + density but overkill for volumetric water circuits [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: Turbine / impeller flowmeter
alternatives.tradeoffs: Lowest unit cost ($5–20 OEM); moving parts degrade with glycol/particulates; bearing wear limits life to 2–3 years; creates pressure drop; glycol-intolerant; no bidirectional detection [SRC: web_search]

alternatives.name: No measurement / pump-curve inference
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero hardware cost; zero installation effort; accuracy ±10–20% at best; no fault detection; no trend data; no regulatory compliance capability [ASM]

jobSteps.description: Specify flow range, pipe diameter, medium type, accuracy class, and communication protocol for the measurement point
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Sensor variant selection directly depends on these parameters [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]
jobSteps.rawStatement: Specify flow range, pipe diameter, medium type, accuracy class, and communication protocol for the measurement point
jobSteps.rationale: Sensor variant selection directly depends on these parameters [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]

jobSteps.description: Identify installation point with adequate straight pipe run and access for wiring
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Installation constraints (straight run, pipe-full) affect measurement accuracy [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]
jobSteps.rawStatement: Identify installation point with adequate straight pipe run and access for wiring
jobSteps.rationale: Installation constraints (straight run, pipe-full) affect measurement accuracy [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]

jobSteps.description: Install sensor inline, connect piping/power/communications, configure fluid type
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Commissioning determines measurement accuracy; fluid-type configuration is required [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]
jobSteps.rawStatement: Install sensor inline, connect piping/power/communications, configure fluid type
jobSteps.rationale: Commissioning determines measurement accuracy; fluid-type configuration is required [SRC: 01_product_decomposition]

jobSteps.description: Verify signal quality, zero-flow baseline, and diagnostic status before process startup
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Pre-startup verification catches latent installation faults
jobSteps.rawStatement: Verify signal quality, zero-flow baseline, and diagnostic status before process startup
jobSteps.rationale: Pre-startup verification catches latent installation faults

jobSteps.description: Continuously measure volumetric flow rate and medium temperature; transmit readings to controller
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Core value-creating function of the sensor [SRC: 02_functional_promise]
jobSteps.rawStatement: Continuously measure volumetric flow rate and medium temperature; transmit readings to controller
jobSteps.rationale: Core value-creating function of the sensor [SRC: 02_functional_promise]

jobSteps.description: Check measurement stability, detect drift, verify diagnostic health during operation
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Long-term accuracy depends on ongoing monitoring; drift is progressive and hard to detect [SRC: web_search]
jobSteps.rawStatement: Check measurement stability, detect drift, verify diagnostic health during operation
jobSteps.rationale: Long-term accuracy depends on ongoing monitoring; drift is progressive and hard to detect [SRC: web_search]
